name: G-3 rule ID namespacing: plugin-shipped rules in default folders must start with g- prefix
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: g
rules:
  - id: ts-001
' > tree/google/g.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-all.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --check-id-namespacing 2>err.txt; grep -q 'plugin-shipped rules must start with g- prefix' err.txt && echo g_required 1>&2
